Steven Weinberg, Esq. of Weinberg, Rogers & Rosenfeld, 510-839-6600, for Petitioner, Moving Party, United Educators. Eric Hill, Esq. of Lozano Smith, 925-302-2000, for Respondant, Opposing Party, San Francisco Unified School District.

RULING:
Argued. PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Order signed. (301/JLW/SL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
